r1: The best matcha I've had in Prague. Creamy, rich and made with care. I come here every week.
r2: A calm place with an incredible atmosphere. The Coconut Cloud Matcha is an experience in itself.
r3: Finally a café where matcha isn't just a trend but the main star. I recommend it to everyone.
mapTitle: Map — NOA Matcha Café, Husitská 55, Prague 3 (Žižkov)

faq.a: You'll find us at Husitská 55, Prague 3 – Žižkov. The nearest tram stop is Husinecká, a short walk from the Main Train Station.

faq.q: Do you also serve regular coffee?
faq.a: Yes. Besides matcha we make espresso, cappuccino, flat white, latte and more — see our menu.
Ceremonial matcha is the highest grade of green tea from the first spring harvest, stone-milled into a fine powder. It has a vivid color and a silky, non-bitter taste.
Yes, you can reserve a table by phone — find the contact on the Contact page.
We're open every day: Mon–Fri 8:00–20:00, Sat 9:00–20:00, Sun 9:00–18:00.

latte.lead: Creamy matcha latte made with ceremonial matcha from Japan — at NOA café in Žižkov.
body: Looking for the best matcha latte in Prague? At NOA Matcha Café we make our matcha latte from premium ceremonial matcha, hand-whisked with a bamboo chasen into a silky foam. No pouch powder, no bitterness — just a rich, natural taste.

sections.h: How we make our matcha latte
sections.p: Every latte is freshly whisked from ceremonial matcha and topped with the milk of your choice. Have it hot or iced — just the way you like it.
Besides the classic matcha latte we offer fruity variations — apricot, raspberry, strawberry — and signature drinks like Coconut Cloud or Maple Sea Salt. See the full menu and prices.
Find us at Husitská 55, Prague 3 – Žižkov. Open every day. Drop by for a cup of premium matcha.

zizkov.lead: NOA Matcha Café — matcha and premium coffee at Husitská 55, Prague 3 (Žižkov).
body: Looking for a calm café in Žižkov? NOA Matcha Café is a spot in the heart of Prague 3 where ceremonial matcha from Japan is the star — but you'll also find great espresso here. Sit down, slow down and enjoy a cup in a pleasant atmosphere.

sections.p: Ceremonial matcha latte (hot or iced), fruity and signature matcha drinks, classic coffee (espresso, cappuccino, flat white, latte) and a calm place to sit.
Husitská 55, 130 00 Prague 3 – Žižkov. The nearest tram stop is Husinecká, a short walk from the Main Train Station.
Mon–Fri 8:00–20:00, Sat 9:00–20:00, Sun 9:00–18:00. Open every day.

ceremonial.lead: The highest grade of matcha from the first spring harvest — at NOA café in Žižkov.
body: What is ceremonial matcha and why does it matter? Ceremonial grade matcha is the finest, highest-quality grade of green tea matcha. The leaves are shaded for weeks before harvest, hand-picked at the first spring harvest and stone-milled into a silky-fine powder. The result is a vivid green color, natural sweetness and no bitterness.

sections.h: How it differs from regular matcha
sections.p: Culinary matcha is cheaper, coarser and more bitter — great for baking. Ceremonial matcha is meant to be sipped on its own or in a latte, because its flavor is smooth and full. We use ceremonial grade only.
Every cup is hand-whisked with a bamboo chasen into a fluffy foam — hot or iced. Have it as pure usucha or as a creamy matcha latte.
Come to Husitská 55, Prague 3 – Žižkov. Open every day.

togo.lead: Your favorite matcha to go — fast, with no compromise on quality.
body: In a hurry? Grab your matcha and coffee to go. We'll make a fresh matcha latte from ceremonial matcha in a takeaway cup — hot or iced — in no time. Same quality as at the bar.

sections.p: Matcha latte (hot / iced), fruity and signature matcha drinks and classic coffee. All freshly made to order.
Drop by Husitská 55, Prague 3 – Žižkov. A short walk from the Husinecká tram stop and the Main Train Station — perfect on your way to work or a walk.

heroTag: Premium café with ceremonial matcha from Japan
cafeH: A place worth coming back to
cafeLead: NOA Matcha is more than a drinks list — it's a café in the heart of Prague.
cafeP: Come sit down, slow down and savor a cup of real ceremonial matcha. Whether you grab your matcha to go or stay for a quiet moment, you are always welcome.
m1d: Smooth, creamy and warming. Premium matcha with warm milk.
m2d: A fruity harmony of sweet apricot and premium matcha.
m3d: Fresh raspberries and gentle matcha in perfect balance.
m4d: Sweet strawberry flavor and premium matcha.
s1d: Refreshing iced coconut water with fluffy matcha cloud foam on top.
s2d: A refreshing blend of jasmine tea and ceremonial matcha.
s3d: Sweet maple syrup, sea salt and a rich matcha taste.
bftitle: We got something for your boyfriends as well
aboutLead: NOA Matcha was born from a simple idea — to make the best matcha in town and serve it the way it deserves.
aboutP1: We source our matcha directly from Japanese tea gardens, where leaves are shaded for weeks before harvest for deeper color and flavor. They're stone-milled into a fine powder that keeps its silky texture in every cup.
aboutP2: We're not just a café. We're a place where every drink is made with care, calm and respect for tradition — and where matcha is always the star.
v1p: No substitutes, no shortcuts. Only real ceremonial matcha.
v2p: Every cup whisked by hand with a bamboo chasen.
v3p: A place to pause and savor the present moment.
contactLead: Drop by for a cup. We'd love to see you.
